title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-06
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the apps and updating the greenhouse metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the apps directory.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard with a checklist, while the bee waters small pixelated code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering small code-plants in a digital greenhouse while a chunky monitor-head robot holds a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering small code-plants in a digital greenhouse while a chunky monitor-head robot holds a tiny clipboard.
